home.heroSubtitle: Buy, sell and auction Pokémon cards on the platform made by collectors, for collectors.
home.quickActions: What would you like to do?
home.heroLoggedInSubtitle: Start a new auction, claimsale or listing — or dive straight into the live auctions and newest cards.
home.featureSecureDesc: All transactions go through an internal balance with escrow protection. No direct payments between buyers and sellers.
home.featureAntiSnipeDesc: Bids in the last 2 minutes automatically extend the auction. Fair for everyone.
home.featureWalletDesc: Pay securely via your platform balance with escrow. Your money is only released after delivery confirmation.
home.featureCommunityDesc: Join a growing community of Pokémon collectors who trade cards daily.
home.whyCardsCenterDesc: The platform built for Pokémon card collectors and traders.
home.step1Desc: Register for free and set up your profile. Ready in under a minute.
home.step2Desc: Browse auctions, claimsales and listings, or list your own cards.
home.step3Desc: Bid on auctions, buy directly or claim individual cards. Secure via our escrow system.
home.ctaDesc: Create a free account and discover thousands of Pokémon cards.
home.pricingTitle: Choose the plan that fits you
home.pricingSubtitle: Start for free or upgrade for unlimited features. Transparent pricing, no surprises.
home.planFreeDesc: Perfect for getting started with buying and selling
home.featuredTooltip: These items are promoted by sellers via a spotlight upgrade.
home.heroV2Eyebrow: The Dutch auction house for Pokémon cards
home.heroV2Subtitle: Bid on rare auctions, buy directly via the marketplace, or claim single cards from a claimsale. All secured by escrow.
home.heroV2ImageAlt: Collector with a Pokémon card in the shop
home.liveAuctionsZoneSubtitle: Active bids, trending items, and freshly listed auctions — all in one place.
home.threePathsTitle: How do you like to collect?
home.threePathsSubtitle: Sell, bid or buy direct — every kind of collector gets their own lane, with escrow and Dutch support along the way.
home.pathAuctionsBuyDesc: Bid on rare cards. Anti-snipe extends the closing minutes, so no 1-second bid wars.
home.pathAuctionsSellDesc: Auction your cards from 3 to 14 days. Winner pays via escrow, you ship safely.
home.pathClaimsalesBuyDesc: Pick individual cards from a series and pay once for everything you claim.
home.pathClaimsalesSellDesc: List a series with fixed prices. Buyers claim, you bundle into one shipment.
home.pathMarketplaceBuyDesc: Thousands of listings — direct buy, chat proposals, or filter by distance and condition.
home.pathMarketplaceSellDesc: Post a listing with fixed price or accept offers. Bundle multiple items into one shipment.
home.claimsalesStorySubtitle: Auctions for rarities, claimsales for individual picks, and everything together in your dashboard.
home.claimsalesStoryImageAlt: Example of a claimsale order detail in the dashboard
home.claimsalesStoryImageAltListing: Example of a claimsale listing with individual claim buttons per card
home.claimsalesChapter1Desc: Whether it becomes an auction, claimsale or fixed-price listing — you put your cards online in a few minutes. Upload photos, pick a type, and your listing is live for the entire community.
home.claimsalesChapter1Bullet1: Auction: 3 to 14 days, with or without a reserve price
home.claimsalesChapter1Bullet2: Claimsale: individual cards at a fixed price each
home.claimsalesChapter1Bullet3: Marketplace: fixed price or accept offers
home.claimsalesChapter1Bullet4: Front and back photo per card in a single upload
home.claimsalesChapter2Desc: Bid, claim or buy directly — pick the method that fits what you're after. Rare cards via auction, individual picks from a claimsale, or a fixed price on the marketplace. All in one account.
home.claimsalesChapter2Bullet1: Auctions: outbid others until the timer ends
home.claimsalesChapter2Bullet2: Claimsales: claim individual cards at fixed price
home.claimsalesChapter2Bullet3: Marketplace: buy directly or send a proposal via chat
home.claimsalesChapter2Bullet4: Filter by distance, condition, delivery and price
home.claimsalesChapter3Desc: Whether you have one order a month or run twenty a day — everything lands in one place. A status timeline per order, packing-slip printer and sort options handle high volumes as smoothly as one-off purchases.
home.claimsalesChapter3Bullet2: Packing-slip print and sort options ready to go
home.claimsalesChapter3Bullet3: One view for auctions, claimsales and marketplace
home.claimsalesChapter3Bullet4: Filter by status, buyer or seller for quick navigation
home.claimsalesStoryImageAltPreview: Example of a claimsale preview during creation
home.trustPillarsSubtitle: Built for collectors who take their cards seriously. No surprises, no middlemen.
home.pillarEscrowDesc: The buyer's money is held until the item is delivered. Only then are funds released.
home.pillarVerificationDesc: ID, IBAN and address verification as trust signals. Required at higher bid amounts.
home.pillarAntiSnipeDesc: A bid in the final 2 minutes auto-extends the auction. Fair for everyone.
home.pillarSupportDesc: A team based in the Netherlands answering your questions — no call centers, no queues.
home.pillarRealBidsDesc: Every bid reserves 10% of the amount from the bidder's balance. Without a deposit, you can't bid — so no price-inflating fake tactics.
home.testimonialsSubtitle: Collectors and sellers who've been using the platform for a while.
home.testimonial1Quote: Finally a platform that understands how collectors trade. Claimsales saved me hours of work each week.
home.testimonial2Quote: The anti-snipe feature is exactly what auctions needed. No more 1-second bid wars.
home.testimonial3Quote: Escrow gives me peace of mind on big purchases. And support actually replies within a day.
home.emptyRecentClaimsalesDesc: Our sellers add new series every week — check back soon, or launch the first claimsale of the week yourself.
home.emptyRecentListingsDesc: The marketplace fills up fast. Filter by distance, condition or price and find the item that completes your collection.
home.emptyRecentSoldDesc: As soon as cards are successfully delivered we'll show a live feed of what the community traded recently — handy as a price reference.
home.emptyTopSellersDesc: There's still room on the leaderboard. Post your first listing, ship reliably and build a reputation fast.
home.recentlySoldSubtitle: A live view of cards that have safely reached their new owner this week.
home.buyerProtectionSubtitle: No direct payments, no unknown shipping addresses, no waiting for a refund. We hold your money until you've got your item in hand.
home.buyerProtectionFootnote: Cards Center is a Dutch platform. Complaints and disputes are handled under Dutch law.
home.buyerProtectionStep1Desc: Check out with your platform balance. One place, no credit card details shared with sellers.
home.buyerProtectionStep2Desc: The amount sits in a separate account — the seller can't touch it until delivery is confirmed.
home.buyerProtectionStep3Desc: Package arrived? Check the item and confirm in one click. Something off? Open a dispute within 10 days.
home.buyerProtectionStep4Desc: Only then does the seller get paid. During a dispute we automatically pause the release.
home.buyerProtectionGuarantee1Desc: Open a dispute within 10 days if there's a problem. We assess independently using photos, chat and tracking — valid claims get the full amount refunded.
home.buyerProtectionGuarantee2Desc: If buyer and seller can't agree, we decide based on evidence. Fair and transparent.
home.buyerProtectionGuarantee3Desc: No chatbots or offshore helpdesk. A team in the Netherlands that understands Pokémon and TCG.
home.buyerProtectionGuarantee4Desc: Your data is never sold. All pages run on TLS encryption and data is stored within the EU.
home.tierBenefitsHomepageSubtitle: Start free, scale up when your sales call for it. Lower commission, more slots and visibility that pays for itself.
home.tierBenefitsHomepageFootnote: All prices excluding VAT. Paid subscriptions are going live soon — register now and pick your plan once Mollie is online.
home.competitorComparisonSubtitle: An honest side-by-side of fees and features. No marketing spin — just the facts next to each other.
home.competitorComparisonFootnote: Rates as of {date}, based on public information from the respective platforms. Cards Center shows the FREE-tier scenario; paid tiers reduce the seller commission to 0%.
home.faqSubtitle: Short, honest answers to the questions new members ask us most.
home.faqA1: A claimsale is a series of individual cards from which each buyer can claim specific cards at a fixed price per card. The seller bundles all claimed cards from one buyer into a single shipment — saving shipping costs and far more efficient than separate listings for large series.
home.faqQ2: How do auctions work on Cards Center?
home.faqA2: Sellers run auctions from 3 to 14 days with an optional reserve price and buy-now price. A bid in the last 2 minutes auto-extends by 2 minutes (anti-snipe), so no more 1-second bid wars. On the winning bid, 10% of your balance is reserved; for auctions from €2,000 ID verification is required.
home.faqA3: All payments go through an internal balance with escrow protection. Your money is locked on our account until you've received and confirmed the item. Sellers never see your banking details — only your shipping address after a successful purchase. Refunds are full and fast.
home.faqQ4: How do shipping and tracking work?
home.faqA4: Sellers pick a fixed shipping service (untracked letter mail is gone — everything is tracked) and upload the tracking link. Orders from €150 require a signature. If there's no tracking update within 14 days of payment, we automatically cancel and refund the full amount.
home.faqQ5: What if something is wrong with my package?
home.faqA5: Open a dispute in the dashboard within 10 to 30 days of delivery. The seller has 48 hours to respond. If you can't agree, our team decides based on photos, chat history and tracking. During a dispute the payment is paused — your money is safe.
home.faqQ6: What are the costs for sellers?
home.faqA6: Sellers pay commission on the item sale price (excluding shipping): 3% on Free, 2.5% on PRO, 2% on Unlimited and 0% on Enterprise. No hidden fees, no listing fees, no monthly minimum — you only pay commission when you actually sell.
home.faqQ7: How do I become a seller?
home.faqA7: Register free, fill in your address and bank details (IBAN verification happens automatically on your first deposit) and you can start listing right away. Sales ≥€2,000 require ID verification — a one-off step that takes about an hour. Customize your profile in minutes.
home.faqQ8: Does Cards Center work on mobile?
home.faqA8: Yes. The full site is mobile-optimized: bidding, claiming, chatting and order management all work from any browser. A dedicated app is on the roadmap, but for now you get the same features everywhere — including push notifications via the browser.
home.faqQ9: What do I pay as a buyer?
home.faqA9: For listings and claimsales you only pay the item price + the seller's shipping cost. For auctions there's a 2.9% buyer's premium on your winning bid — shown up-front when you place a bid and in the confirmation, no surprise after the fact. No account or subscription fees for buyers.
home.faqQ10: How do I top up my balance?
home.faqA10: Transfer the desired amount to our bank account using your unique reference code (shown at <link>Dashboard → Balance</link>). It typically lands on your platform balance within 1 business day. No credit card or iDEAL fees. Your first transfer automatically links to IBAN verification if you've added an IBAN to your profile.
home.faqQ11: How do I get my earnings paid out?
home.faqA11: Request a payout from €10 via <link>Dashboard → Payouts</link>. We review the request and typically transfer to the IBAN on your profile within 2 business days. No payout fee, no minimum revenue threshold.
home.faqQ12: Can I buy and sell internationally?
home.faqA12: Yes, within the EU. By default you ship to the Netherlands and direct neighbors, but you can extend your shipping area to all of the EU via <link>Dashboard → Shipping</link>. The system automatically calculates the right rates per zone (domestic · neighbors · wider EU).
home.faqQ13: How do you prevent fake bids?
home.faqA13: Every bid reserves 10% of the amount (including the 2.9% buyer's premium) on the bidder's balance. Someone without a deposit simply can't place a bid. Above €2,000 ID verification is also required, and non-paying winners get automatic strikes that can lead to suspension. Result: only serious bids, no price-inflating fake tactics — sellers and buyers both benefit.
home.faqSupportDesc: Our support team usually replies within one business day — and we speak both English and Dutch.

auction.title: Title
auction.reservePriceHelp: Hidden minimum price. The auction is only valid if this amount is reached.
auction.buyNowPriceHelp: Buyers can skip the auction immediately for this price. Disappears when bids reach 75% of this price.
auction.runnerUpEnabled: Roll over to runner-up if winner does not pay
auction.runnerUpEnabledHelp: If the winner doesn't pay within 5 days, we offer the auction to the next highest bidder. They have 72 hours to accept or decline. If they decline or don't respond, the offer rolls to the next bidder. Closes without a sale if no one accepts.
auction.timingIntro: Plan when your auction goes live and when it ends. The time on the end-day decides the snipe moment — early evening works best.
auction.startDateHelp: Today or up to 7 days ahead.
auction.sweetSpotHint: Between 19:00 and 21:00 buyers are most active — sniping pushes prices up.
auction.instantStartHint: Auction goes live immediately, ends on {endDate}
auction.auctionScheduledExplain: Bidding opens once the auction goes live. Add it to your watchlist now.
auction.deliveryHelp: Choose how the winner receives their purchase. With "Both" each bidder picks shipping or pickup when they bid.
auction.pickupLocationMissing: No city set on your profile. Add it before posting a pickup auction.
auction.pickupLocationPrivacy: Only your city is public. The exact address is shared in chat after sale.
auction.validationReserveBelowStart: Reserve price cannot be lower than the starting bid.
auction.validationBuyNowBelowStart: Buy Now price must be higher than the starting bid.
auction.validationBuyNowBelowReserve: Buy Now price must be higher than the reserve price.
auction.reviewReserveExplain: The auction only sells if at least {amount} is bid. If the reserve isn't met, the auction ends without a sale.
auction.reviewNoReserveExplain: The auction always sells to the highest bidder, regardless of the final amount.
auction.reviewBuyNowExplain: Buyers can skip the auction by paying {amount} immediately. Disappears automatically once bids reach {cutoff} (75%).
auction.reviewPremiumExplain: The buyer pays {rate} on top of the winning bid. On a {start} bid, the buyer pays a total of {total}.
auction.reviewScheduledExplain: The auction is ready but only goes live on {date}. Bidding is closed until then.
auction.reviewInstantExplain: The auction goes live immediately after you click publish. Bidders can join right away.
auction.reviewRunnerUpEnabled: Roll over to up to {count} next bidder(s) if the winner doesn't pay within 5 days.
auction.reviewRunnerUpDisabled: Roll-over disabled. If the winner doesn't pay, the auction closes without a sale.
auction.buyNowConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to buy this item for €{price}? This amount will be deducted from your balance immediately.
auction.buyNowConfirmPartial: Are you sure you want to buy this item for €{price}? 10% of this amount (€{reserve}) will be held until you complete payment. You have 5 days to pay.
auction.autoBidExplain: Set a maximum amount. The system will automatically bid the minimum needed to stay the highest bidder, up to your maximum.
auction.selectType: What do you want to auction?
auction.multiCardDesc: Auction multiple individual cards in one lot
auction.collectionDesc: Auction a full collection or bundle of cards
auction.sealedProductDesc: Auction an unopened product (booster, ETB, tin, etc.)
auction.otherDesc: Auction playmats, binders, figures and more
auction.upsellSpotlightDesc: Your auction is featured on the homepage
auction.upsellHighlightDesc: Stand out at the top of the category list
auction.upsellUrgentDesc: An eye-catching "Closing Soon!" label on your auction
auction.photoRecommend: We recommend adding at least 2 photos.
auction.startingBidTooLowTitle: A starting bid below €{min} is better suited for a claimsale
auction.startingBidTooLowBody: Low-value items sell more easily through a claimsale. Set a fixed per-item price and let buyers claim instantly.
auction.pricingHelperStep1Sub: We use this as the basis for our suggestion.
auction.pricingHelperStep4Sub: Linked to your strategy by default — you can override below.
auction.pricingHelperQ1: What's the estimated market value of this item?
auction.pricingHelperQ1Hint: Estimate roughly what the item should sell for.
auction.pricingHelperQ2: How quickly do you want to sell?
auction.pricingHelperDurationHint: Shorter = more bidding pressure in the final hours. Longer = more reach and more chance of a bidding war.
auction.pricingHelperStrategyFlashDesc: Max urgency — low starting bid, fast conversion.
auction.pricingHelperStrategyFastDesc: Sell fast with room for bidders.
auction.pricingHelperStrategyStandardDesc: Balance between attention and final price.
auction.pricingHelperReserveInfo: A reserve price is a hidden minimum amount. If bids don't reach it, the auction ends without a sale. Buyers see that a reserve exists, but not the amount.
auction.pricingHelperReserveProsA: Protects you from selling far below market value.
auction.pricingHelperReserveProsB: You can pick an aggressively low starting bid for maximum attention without risk.
auction.pricingHelperReserveProsC: Peace of mind — no surprise losses if bids stay low.
auction.pricingHelperReserveConsA: Some buyers drop off the moment they see there's a hidden reserve.
auction.pricingHelperReserveConsB: If bids stay below the reserve, the auction ends without a sale and you have to relist.
auction.pricingHelperReserveConsC: Less useful for low-value items where market value is obvious.
auction.pricingHelperBuyNowInfo: With a Buy Now price, a buyer can close the auction immediately without waiting. Once bids reach 75% of Buy Now, this option is automatically removed.
auction.pricingHelperBuyNowProsA: Quick, guaranteed sale for buyers who don't want auction tension.
auction.pricingHelperBuyNowProsB: Works well for items with a clear market value (sealed product, known cards).
auction.pricingHelperBuyNowProsC: Attracts impulse buyers — no waiting for the end.
auction.pricingHelperBuyNowConsA: You're setting your own ceiling — a bidding war could go higher.
auction.pricingHelperBuyNowConsB: Once the option expires (75% of Buy Now reached), the effect is gone.
auction.pricingHelperBuyNowConsC: Not useful if you really want to maximize the final price.
auction.pricingHelperAdviceFootnote: Suggestion based on your answers — feel free to adjust the amounts manually afterwards.
auction.photoTipSingleCard: Photograph the front and back of the card
auction.photoTipMultiCard: Take photos of all cards, preferably per card
auction.photoTipCollection: Take an overview photo and detail shots
auction.photoTipSealed: Photograph the product from multiple angles
auction.photoTipOther: Add clear photos of the item
auction.sponsoredTooltip: These auctions are promoted by sellers and appear at the top.
auction.balanceReservedInfo: €{amount} of your balance is reserved for bids on other auctions.
auction.bidTooHighWarning: You don't have enough balance for this bid. Your maximum bid is €{max}. Top up your balance to bid higher.
auction.noBalanceTitle: Make a deposit to place bids
auction.noBalanceMessage: You need at least 10% of your bid amount as balance to place a valid bid.
auction.bidExceedsBalanceWarning: Your bid exceeds your deposited balance. Consider <link>topping up your balance</link> if you plan to keep bidding on this lot.

verifiedRequired.message: Bids ≥ €2000 require a verified account. Verify your identity to place this bid.

failures.strikeWarning: You have {count} payment failure{count, plural, one {} other {s}} on auctions. At 2× you'll be auto-suspended for 30 days, at 3× permanently.
failures.forfeited: Deposit of €{amount} forfeited due to payment failure.
failures.autoSuspendTemp: Account suspended for 30 days due to 2× payment failures on auctions.
failures.autoSuspendPermanent: Account permanently suspended due to 3× payment failures on auctions.

claimsale.typeChangeWarning: You already added items. Switching type clears them. Continue?

claimsale.verzendingItemsHint: Items ship as a standard or signed parcel.
claimsale.mailboxHintCards: On by default for cards — fits through the letterbox. For orders of €150+ the buyer automatically gets a parcel.
claimsale.promotieIntro: Optional — boost your claimsale's visibility. Each promotion is a one-time purchase that runs for the whole claimsale (up to 14 days).
claimsale.insufficientBalance: Insufficient balance for the selected promotion options.
claimsale.timingIntro: Choose when your claimsale goes live. Now, or scheduled up to 5 days ahead.
claimsale.startDateHelp: Today = live immediately. A later date schedules the claimsale.

claimsale.needOneItem: Add at least one item with a price.

wallet.depositInstructions: Transfer the amount to the account below. Your balance will be credited after receipt.
wallet.bankTransferInstructions: Transfer the desired amount to the account below using your personal reference code. Your balance will be credited within 1-2 business days.
wallet.referenceWarning: Always include your reference code with the transfer. Without it, we cannot link your payment to your account.
wallet.idealComingSoonDescription: We are working on a direct iDEAL integration so your balance is credited in seconds. In the meantime, use a bank transfer.
wallet.pendingPaymentsDescription: You have won auctions that still require payment. Top up your balance and pay before the deadline.
wallet.availableBalanceHint: This amount is available for purchases and bids.
wallet.reservedBalanceHint: 10% of your active bids is reserved as a guarantee.
wallet.heldBalanceHint: Amounts waiting for buyers to confirm delivery.

escrow.title: What is escrow?
escrow.description: Escrow is a secure system where the paid amount is held by Cards Center as an independent third party. The money is not sent directly to the seller, but safely held until the buyer confirms that the package has been received in good condition. This protects both buyers and sellers in every transaction.
escrow.step1Desc: The purchase amount is deducted from the buyer's balance.
escrow.step2Desc: The amount is securely held in an escrow account. No one can access it in the meantime.
escrow.step3Desc: The seller ships the item to the buyer. The funds remain safely in escrow.
escrow.step4Desc: Once the buyer confirms receipt, the funds are immediately released to the seller.
escrow.disputeDesc: If the package doesn't arrive or is damaged, you can open a dispute. Cards Center will mediate and can refund the amount.
escrow.autoRelease: The amount is automatically released after 30 days if no dispute has been opened.

pickupCodeWarning.title: Wait — does this contain a pickup code?
pickupCodeWarning.intro: Your message looks like a pickup code (pattern letter-digit-letter-digit-digit, e.g. N3L97). Before you send:
pickupCodeWarning.bullet1: The pickup code is meant to show the seller in person at pickup — never before.
pickupCodeWarning.bullet2: Some scammers ask for the code via chat and use it to trigger the payout without you receiving anything.
pickupCodeWarning.bullet3: The platform releases escrow to the seller as soon as the code is entered.
pickupCodeWarning.confirmQuestion: Are you sure you want to send this — have you already picked up the item?

bundleOffer.amountHint: Shipping is included — enter a single total.

requestInsured.hint: The seller will be required to pick a signed-for method on accept.

pickup.codeForBuyer: Pickup code (show to seller at pickup)
pickup.codeWarning: Only share this code IN PERSON at pickup. Never send it in chat — scammers ask for it before you receive the goods.
pickup.tooManyAttempts: Too many wrong codes — locked for 1 hour.
pickup.confirmCancelReservation: Cancel this reservation? The listings will become available again.
pickup.noScheduleYet: Arrange a pickup time in chat.
pickup.awaitingResponse: Waiting for response to pickup proposal in chat.
pickup.noConversationSeller: Open the chat via Messages — buyer starts the conversation.
pickup.paymentModePlatform: Already paid via wallet — pickup only
pickup.confirmExternalDialog: Did you collect the product and pay the seller? This closes the order.

errors.invalidDate: Date must be today or later
errors.invalidWindow: End time must be later than start time

proposal.amountExclShipping: Excl. shipping — shipping is added on top.
proposal.proposalAccepted: Offer accepted! The listing has been sold.
proposal.proposalRejected: Offer rejected. You can make a new offer.
proposal.alreadyPending: There is already a pending offer for this listing.
proposal.listingNotActive: This listing is no longer available.
proposal.balanceSufficient: Your balance is sufficient. The amount will be deducted immediately upon acceptance.
proposal.balanceInsufficient: Your balance is insufficient. After accepting, you have 5 days to top up your balance and complete the payment.

listing.title: Title

actions.reservedHint: This listing is linked to an active deal. Actions become available once the buyer pays or the reservation expires.
actions.confirmPause: Pause this listing? Any pending offers will be rejected.
actions.confirmCloseRest: Are you sure you want to close this listing? Remaining items will no longer be available. Pending offers will be rejected.
actions.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this listing?

listing.partiallySoldHint: This listing is partially sold. {available} of {total} items still available. Request the items you want via chat.
listing.shippingMethodsHint: Select the shipping methods you want to offer for this listing.
listing.freeShippingNote: The buyer pays no shipping costs.
listing.typeMultiCardDesc: Sell multiple cards as one bundle. Want to sell each card separately? Create a claimsale.
listing.typeCollectionDesc: Sell a collection of cards, sealed products and/or accessories together
listing.typeSealedProductDesc: Sell an unopened product (booster, ETB, tin, etc.)
listing.typeOtherDesc: Sell playmats, binders, figures and more
listing.selectType: What do you want to sell?

partialSale.label: Allow partial sale
partialSale.hint: Buyers can then propose to buy a subset of the items via chat. After accept the remaining items stay available as 'partially sold'.

listing.multiCardBundleHint: A multi-card listing is sold as one bundle. List which cards are included in the description. Want to sell each card separately? Create a claimsale.

shippingDisplay.mailboxHint: Off by default. Only allowed for single-card and card-bundle listings under €150.
shippingDisplay.mailboxOnlyForCards: Only available for single-card and multi-card listings
shippingDisplay.lockedNote: Standard and tracked-signed parcel are always included. Manage your shipping methods and rates via <link>Dashboard → Shipping</link>.

stockQuantity.label: Stock (quantity)
stockQuantity.hint: Enter how many of this product you have. With more than 1, buyers can purchase per unit via a 'How many?' picker on the detail page.

buyQuantity.label: How many?
buyQuantity.purchaseComplete: Purchase successful — check your order in /aankopen.

suggestedPrice.label: Asking price (optional)
suggestedPrice.hint: Gives buyers a target amount. Not binding — offers may go higher or lower.

buyOptions.title: Buy options

allowDirectBuy.label: Allow Buy Now
allowDirectBuy.hint: Shows a 'Buy Now' button at your asking price. Disable if you only want offers via chat.

acceptsOffers.label: Accept offers
acceptsOffers.hint: Shows a 'Make offer' button. Disable if you stick to your asking price and don't want negotiations.

buyOptions.atLeastOne: Allow at least Buy Now or offers — otherwise no one can buy the listing.

pickupPayment.title: How do you want to be paid at pickup?

platform.label: Upfront via wallet
platform.hint: Buyer pays via platform balance. We hold the money in escrow until you confirm pickup with a code. Safer for both. Commission applies.

external.label: Pay you at pickup
external.hint: No platform payment — buyer pays you at pickup. No commission, no escrow. No platform protection in case of dispute.

pickupPayment.atLeastOne: Allow at least one payment method.

conditionRange.label: Condition range (optional)
conditionRange.hint: Indicate the condition extremes for cards in this collection.

directBuy.label: Buy Now for
directBuy.pickupHint: No shipping cost — buyer collects from seller
directBuy.pickupModalHint: Pickup with code-confirm. Guaranteed safe transaction.
directBuy.errorPickupOnly: This listing is pickup-only — no shipping purchase available.
directBuy.directBuyDisabledByseller: The seller only accepts offers via chat.

pickupReserve.headline: Reserve for pickup — €{price}
pickupReserve.hint: Pay seller directly at pickup. No platform protection.
pickupReserve.confirmDialog: Reserve "{title}" for pickup? Listing held for you for 14 days. Pay seller at pickup.
pickupReserve.reserved: Reserved. Arrange pickup time in chat.

offerButton.label: Make offer
offerButton.disabledHint: The seller does not accept offers on this listing.

listing.negotiableHint: Negotiable — open a chat to make an offer.

pickupLocation.label: Pickup location
pickupLocation.privacyHint: Only your city is publicly visible — not your postal code or address. Exchange the exact address via chat.
pickupLocation.noCityWarning: You haven't set your city yet. Add it via <link>Dashboard → Shipping</link> before publishing a pickup listing.

listing.freeShippingTooltip: Shipping costs are included in the sale price
listing.packageCountHint: Large collections may require multiple packages
listing.upsellSpotlightDesc: Your listing is featured on the homepage
listing.upsellHighlightDesc: Stand out at the top of the category list
listing.upsellUrgentDesc: An eye-catching "Close-Out Sale!" label on your listing
listing.photoTipSingleCard: Photograph the front and back of the card
listing.photoTipMultiCard: Take photos of all cards, preferably per card
listing.photoTipCollection: Take an overview photo and detail shots
listing.photoTipSealed: Photograph the product from multiple angles
listing.photoTipOther: Add clear photos of the item
listing.photoRecommend: We recommend adding at least 2 photos.
listing.cardNameRequired: Select or enter the card name
listing.cardItemsRequired: Add at least one card to the list
listing.pickupCityRequired: Enter your city in your profile to allow pickup
listing.pickupPaymentRequired: Allow at least one pickup payment method
listing.buyOptionsRequired: Allow at least Direct Buy or offers
listing.shippingMethodRequired: Select at least one shipping method
listing.shippingMethodNoneAvailable: Add a shipping method on your shipping page first
listing.upsellDeductNotice: This amount will be deducted from your balance when publishing.
listing.sponsoredTooltip: These listings are shown because the seller has paid for extra visibility.
listing.selectShippingMethodsHint: Which methods can the buyer choose for this listing?
listing.promotionDescription: Boost your listing with homepage-spotlight, category-highlight or eye-catching labels.
listing.labelsDescription: Up to 2 labels on your card with custom color — one-off €0.99 for 1, €1.69 for 2.
listing.labelDisclaimer: CTR multipliers shown are industry-average indications — your result may vary.
listing.labelPricingLine: Price: 1 label €0.99 · 2 labels €1.69 — one-off per listing · color included

watchlist.title: Watchlist
watchlist.empty: Your watchlist is empty. Click the heart icon on an auction, claimsale or listing to follow it.

emailPrefs.title: Email preferences
emailPrefs.subtitle: Choose what you want to receive emails about
emailPrefs.verifyHint: Your email address is not verified yet — emails will only be sent once you have verified your address. Check your inbox or request a new verification email from your dashboard.
emailPrefs.alwaysOnDesc: Important service emails about your account (suspensions, verification results, admin messages) are always sent.

bids.title: Live Hub
bids.subtitle: Track your auctions, bid quickly, and keep an eye on your bids — all from one place.
bids.empty: You're not tracking any auctions and haven't placed bids yet. Add auctions to your Live Hub via the heart on auction cards.
bids.liveDescription: Auctions you're tracking or have bid on. Live-updates on new bids — bid directly from here.
bids.liveEmpty: No auctions tracked yet. Add auctions via the heart icon on auction cards or detail pages.
bids.autobidArmedHint: You've been outbid, but your autobid can still come back up to €{max}.
bids.autobidExplainer: Set the maximum you're willing to pay. We'll bid for you automatically — always just above the current top bid, never above your maximum. That way you only pay what's needed to stay on top. We reserve 10% of your maximum on your balance while the auction runs.
bids.trackingOnlyHint: You're tracking this auction. You haven't bid yet — bid directly above.
bids.autobidActiveHint: Your autobid will bid back automatically up to €{max}.

search.title: Search Results
search.noResultsHint: Try a different search term or adjust your filters.

reputation.commentPlaceholder: Tell about your experience with this seller...
reputation.responsePlaceholder: Write a response to this review...
reputation.maxLevelReached: You have reached the highest level!

pokedex.noCardsYet: No cards of this Pokémon in our database yet.

cancellation.sectionHelp: Request a cancellation before shipping. The other party has 7 days to respond.
cancellation.requestExplain: Provide a reason so the other party understands why.
cancellation.waitingForResponse: Waiting for the other party's response
cancellation.proposerExplain: The other party can accept (full refund + items released) or reject (order stays, delivery obligation remains).
cancellation.responderExplain: Respond before expiration — if no response, the request lapses automatically and the order stays open.
cancellation.expiresInDays: Expires in {count, plural, =1 {# day} other {# days}}
cancellation.expiresInHours: Expires in {count, plural, =1 {# hour} other {# hours}}
cancellation.expiresInMinutes: Expires in {count, plural, =1 {# minute} other {# minutes}}
cancellation.confirmAccept: Are you sure you want to accept this cancellation? The amount is refunded and the order is voided.

suspension.allowedActions: While suspended you can't place bids, buy, create listings or send messages. You can still request withdrawals, respond to disputes and confirm ongoing shipments.

blockReport.detailsPlaceholder: What happened? Give enough detail so a moderator can assess.
blockReport.evidenceHint: Link to a screenshot, listing or chat log.
blockReport.suspendReasonPlaceholder: Reason for suspension (visible to the user)
blockReport.confirmLift: Are you sure you want to lift the suspension?

withdrawal.title: Withdrawals
withdrawal.hasActiveRequest: You already have a pending withdrawal request. Wait until it's processed before submitting a new one.
withdrawal.confirmMarkPaid: Are you sure you want to mark this request as paid? This means the transfer has been completed.

footer.tagline: Buy, sell and auction Pokémon trading cards in one place.

cart.title: Shopping Cart
cart.conflictMessage: {name} has already been purchased by someone else.
cart.claimedByOther: This item has already been sold.
cart.claimWarning: Claimed items are reserved for 15 minutes. Check out in time!
cart.itemUnavailable: This item is no longer available
cart.mergeSavesShipping: Save shipping — included in the same shipment
cart.mergeNewSeparateDesc: Separate shipment with its own shipping cost

shipping.addressDescription: Your address will be shared with sellers after purchase.
shipping.addressEditNote: You can change your address at most once every 30 days.
shipping.addressLockedUntil: Your address is locked. Next change possible in {days} day(s) (on {date}).
shipping.addressFirstEditFree: Your first address change is free. After that a 30-day cooldown applies.
shipping.methodsDescription: Set up the shipping methods buyers can choose at checkout.
shipping.noMethods: You have not set up any shipping methods yet.
shipping.noMethodsConfigured: This seller has not configured shipping methods yet.
shipping.noMethodsForCountry: No shipping methods available for your country.
shipping.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this shipping method?
shipping.pricingTip: Set the price including packaging materials. Buyers will see this price at checkout.
shipping.addressRequired: Please fill in your shipping address first.
shipping.selectShippingMethodsHint: Select the shipping methods available for this auction.
shipping.cannotDeleteDefault: Default shipping methods cannot be deleted.
shipping.defaultPriceOnly: This is a default shipping method. Only the price can be changed.
shipping.mailboxWarning: Make sure your item fits in a mailbox package!
shipping.mailboxWarningDetail: Note: you selected mailbox shipping. Make sure all items you sell actually fit through a mailbox. With multiple items per order this can be tricky — consider also offering a parcel option.
shipping.setPricesWarning: Set your shipping prices before listing items.
shipping.briefpostWarning: Regular mail has no tracking. Disputes cannot be opened for untracked shipments.
shipping.briefpostNotAllowed: Regular mail is not available for orders above €{amount}. Only tracked shipping methods are shown.
shipping.proofPhotosHintBriefpost: Take a photo of the letter with contents and the sealed letter. This is required for regular mail.
shipping.proofPhotosHintTracked: Optional: add photos of the package as extra proof.
shipping.proofPromptStrongBody: Upload a photo of the shipping label AND the contents before sealing. In case of disputes this is your strongest evidence that the shipment is correct.
shipping.proofRequired: At least 1 photo is required for regular mail shipping.
shipping.trackingNumberHint: Enter only the tracking number, not a full link. The tracking link is generated automatically.
shipping.trackingNumberNotUrl: Enter only the tracking number, not a full link.
shipping.letterNotAvailable: Letter mail is not available for {count} items (max {max}).
shipping.requireNonLetterMethod: You must offer at least one parcel or mailbox parcel option alongside letter mail.
shipping.selectAtLeastOneMethod: Select at least one shipping method.
shipping.signedRecommended: Signed delivery is recommended for this amount for extra protection.
shipping.signedRequiredThreshold: Signed delivery (with signature) is required for orders above €{amount}.
shipping.signedRequiredInternational: Signed delivery (with signature) is required for international shipments.
shipping.sellingCountriesDescription: Choose which countries you ship to. Buyers outside your region won't see your items.
shipping.nlOnlyDescription: I only ship within the Netherlands
shipping.nlBeDescription: I ship to the Netherlands and Belgium
shipping.allEuDescription: I ship to all EU countries
shipping.scopeDomesticOnlyDescription: I only ship within my own country
shipping.scopeAllEuDescription: I ship to all 27 EU countries
shipping.scopeNoNeighborsTooltip: Your location has no EU neighbour countries. Choose between domestic only or all of Europe.
shipping.staticIntro: Shipping rates are fixed per zone. You can adjust them ±50% or change the carrier.
shipping.noCountrySetMessage: Set your country in your profile before managing shipping.
shipping.noMethodsAvailable: No shipping methods available for your country.
shipping.priceTipBuyerAttractive: Tip: keep your shipping price as close to the base price as possible. Lower shipping costs make your listings more attractive to buyers.
shipping.requiredSlotTooltip: Signed shipping is required within your shipping region — adjust your shipping region to disable this method.

sellerClaims.title: Sold Items
sellerClaims.markedAsShipped: Order has been marked as shipped.
sellerClaims.trackingUrlHint: Required: paste the tracking link so the buyer can track the package.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.cancelledNotice: Your subscription has been cancelled and will expire at the end of the current period.
subscription.commissionBaseTooltip: Commission is charged on the item sale price, excluding shipping fees.
subscription.headerSubtitle: Choose the plan that fits how you sell
subscription.breakEvenLabel: Pays for itself from €{amount} sales per month
subscription.auctionPremiumNote: Auctions also include a 2.9% buyer's premium
subscription.enterpriseRequestDescription: For sellers with €25,000+ monthly sales. Personal onboarding and account manager.
subscription.tierProTagline: For active hobbyists and small dealers
subscription.tierUnlimitedTagline: For sellers who want to scale — lower fees, more visibility

verification.title: Account Verification
verification.description: Verify your identity to unlock higher limits and receive a verification badge.
verification.verifiedDescription: Your account is verified. You have access to higher limits.
verification.pendingDescription: Your verification is being reviewed by our team. This may take a few business days.
verification.uploadDescription: Upload a valid identity document. Your data is stored securely and only used for verification.
verification.submitSuccess: Your verification request has been submitted. We will review it as soon as possible.

sales.title: My Sales
sales.awaitingPaymentSectionTitle: Waiting for payment — no action needed
sales.awaitingPaymentSectionBody: We handle automatic follow-up. If the buyer doesn't pay within 5 days the bid moves to the next bidder (runner-up), or the auction expires. You'll get a notification when the payment arrives or the flow concludes.
sales.shipDeadlineCountdown: Ship within {days} days to avoid auto-cancellation
sales.awaitingPaymentInfo: The buyer has 5 days to complete the remaining payment.
sales.autoConfirmInfo: Auto-confirmed on {date} if the buyer does not respond.
sales.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this order of €{amount}? The amount will be refunded to the buyer.
sales.cancelSuccess: Order cancelled. The amount has been refunded to the buyer.
sales.searchPlaceholder: Search by order number, buyer or amount...
sales.refundAfterShipHint: Refund becomes available once you mark the order as shipped.
sales.refundDescription: Send a (partial) refund to the buyer. Enter an amount and optionally a reason that the buyer will see.
sales.refundReasonPlaceholder: E.g. damaged card, missing item, discount
sales.refundConfirm: Are you sure you want to refund €{amount} to {buyer}? This cannot be undone.
sales.refundSuccess: €{amount} has been refunded to the buyer.
sales.refundFullyRefunded: This order has already been fully refunded.

purchases.title: My Purchases
purchases.autoConfirmWarning: Will be auto-confirmed on {date} if you do not respond.
purchases.confirmDeliveryDescription: Confirm that you have received the order. Optionally leave a review for the seller.
purchases.waitingForShipment: Waiting for the seller to ship.
purchases.staleWarningBody: In {daysLeft} days the order will be automatically cancelled with full refund. Want to request cancellation now? That's faster (max 7 days mutual agreement).
purchases.autoCancelledBody: The seller didn't ship within 14 days. The full amount has been refunded to your balance.
purchases.searchPlaceholder: Search by order number, seller or amount...

disputes.title: My Disputes
disputes.openDisputeDescriptionV2: Describe what's going on as clearly as possible. Photos help the seller and admin with the assessment — not required, but strongly recommended.
disputes.descriptionPlaceholderV2: What happened? What did you receive vs. what did you expect? When did you last have contact?
disputes.evidenceHintV2: Up to 6 photos (max 5MB each). Photos are automatically reviewed for acceptable content.
disputes.openDisputeDescription: Describe your issue as clearly as possible. Add evidence (photos) if available.
disputes.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the issue in detail (minimum 20 characters)...
disputes.cannotDisputeYet: You cannot open a dispute for this order yet.
disputes.disputeAlreadyExists: A dispute has already been opened for this order.
disputes.explainOpen: The seller has 7 days to respond. If there is no response, the dispute will be automatically resolved in your favor.
disputes.explainResponded: The seller has responded. You can accept the response, make a counter-proposal, or escalate the dispute.
disputes.explainEscalated: The dispute has been escalated to an admin. An admin will review the dispute and make a decision.
disputes.resolutionNoRefund: No refund — in favor of the seller.
disputes.sellerResponsePlaceholder: Describe your side of the story (minimum 20 characters)...
disputes.acceptResponseHint: You accept the sellers explanation and the dispute will be closed without a refund.
disputes.requestRefundHint: The dispute will be escalated to an admin for review.
disputes.proposePartialRefundHintBuyer: Propose an amount as a compromise. The seller can accept this.
disputes.proposePartialRefundHintSeller: Propose an amount as a compromise. The buyer can accept this.
disputes.acceptProposalHintBuyer: If you accept, you will receive €{amount} back.
disputes.acceptProposalHintSeller: If you accept, €{amount} will be refunded to the buyer.
disputes.proposalPendingSelfBuyer: You proposed €{amount}. Waiting for the seller to respond.
disputes.proposalPendingSelfSeller: You proposed €{amount}. Waiting for the buyer to respond.
disputes.escalateDescription: If you cannot reach an agreement, both parties can escalate the dispute to an admin. Both parties must agree.
disputes.escalateWaiting: You agreed to escalation. Waiting for the other party.
disputes.escalateBothAccepted: Both parties agreed. An admin will review the dispute.
disputes.buyerReviewDeadline: Respond before {date}. After this date the dispute will be automatically resolved.

errors.title: Something went wrong
errors.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

buyback.title: Sell Calculator
buyback.subtitle: Sell your Pokémon cards to Cards Center
buyback.collectionDesc: Sell valuable singles — price based on 85% of the current market value
buyback.pricingDisclaimerBody: The displayed buyback price is an estimate based on current market data. Price errors can occur.
buyback.bulkDesc: Sell large quantities — fixed prices per category
buyback.step1Desc: Search and select the cards you want to sell using our calculator.
buyback.step2Desc: Review your selection, choose your payout method and submit your request. Ship the cards to Cards Center.
buyback.step3Desc: We inspect the cards for condition (Near Mint) and centering.
buyback.step4Desc: After approval, you receive the payout to your bank account or as store credit.
buyback.conditionNM: Only Near Mint cards are accepted
buyback.conditionCentering: Cards must not be clearly off-center
buyback.conditionPricing: Buyback price is 85% of the Marktprijs
buyback.conditionEra: Only cards from the XY series (2014) and newer
buyback.conditionPayout: Payout via bank transfer or store credit (5% bonus)
buyback.searchPlaceholder: Search for a card by name or number...
buyback.notEligible: This card cannot be sold to us at the moment
buyback.bulkNoticeDesc: Use the bulk calculator to sell cards in bulk at fixed prices.
buyback.minimumNotMetCollection: Minimum buyback value of €5.00 not reached
buyback.minimumNotMetBulk: Minimum buyback value of €30.00 not reached
buyback.bulkSectionPokemonDesc: Sort your cards by category and enter quantities. Near Mint only.
buyback.bulkSectionOtherDesc: Code cards, coins, sleeves and sealed energy — don't count as cards.
buyback.bulkMinimumMet: Minimum of {amount} reached — you can continue
buyback.shippingAdviceDesc: Estimated based on per-category weight — max {max} per package to stay within carrier limits.
buyback.shippingAdviceNotRequired: This is a recommendation, not a requirement. You may split the bulk differently as long as each package stays under the carrier limit.
buyback.storeCreditBonusDesc: Receive 5% extra value when choosing store credit on your account
buyback.accountHolderPlaceholder: As listed on your bank account
buyback.confirmNearMint: I confirm that all cards are in Near Mint condition
buyback.confirmNotOffCenter: I confirm that none of the cards are clearly off-center
buyback.confirmSorted: I confirm that the cards are sorted by category
buyback.confirmTermsSuffix: and understand the sale becomes binding upon shipping.
buyback.successDesc: Your request has been processed. Ship your package within 5 days and submit your tracking code via your dashboard.
buyback.shippingAddress:

1234 AB Amsterdam

buyback.packingStep2: Place cards in sleeves or toploaders
buyback.packingStep3: Pack securely in a bubble envelope or box

buyback.packingStep5: Ship with tracking or registered mail
buyback.packingInstructionsLinkDesc: Step-by-step guide, shipping address and carrier options — opens in a new tab
